themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "What areas of your life need better documentation and accountability before God?". Word-study detail reinforces "גּוֹרָ֛ל: lots - properly, a pebble, i.e., a lot (small stones being used for that purpose);...".

Commentary leans on "Shiloh (modern Khirbet Seilun) sits in Ephraim's hill country about 20 miles north of Jerusal...".
